wellbeing.severe: 您当前的幸福感和积极体验处于较高水平，反映出良好的心理健康和生活适应。
wellbeing.moderate: 此水平反映出较好的心理健康状态，您在多数时候能够感受到生活的意义和满足感。
wellbeing.normal: 这表明您当前的幸福感和生活满意度处于较低水平，可能需要关注自我关爱和生活调整。
wellbeing.mild: 您的幸福感处于一般水平，提升积极体验和社交连接可能有助于改善整体感受。

general.normal: 这表明您当前的心理健康状态良好，各方面功能运作正常。
general.mild: 轻度的心理困扰在生活中是常见的，关注自我关爱和调节有助于保持良好状态。
general.severe: 当前心理健康困扰较为突出，可能已影响到您的日常功能，建议与专业人士交流获得帮助。
general.moderate: 此水平的心理困扰可能已对您的日常生活产生一定影响，建议关注并采取积极的应对措施。

wellbeing.severe: Your well-being and positive experiences are at a high level, reflecting strong psychological health and life adaptation.
wellbeing.moderate: This level reflects a generally positive psychological state, where you can experience meaning and satisfaction in most aspects of life.
wellbeing.normal: This indicates that your current sense of well-being and life satisfaction is relatively low. Focusing on self-care and lifestyle adjustments may be beneficial.
wellbeing.mild: Your well-being is at a moderate level. Increasing positive experiences and social connections may help improve your overall sense of fulfillment.

general.normal: This indicates that your overall mental health is in good condition, with all areas of functioning working well.
general.mild: Mild psychological concerns are common in life. Focusing on self-care and healthy coping strategies can help maintain well-being.
general.severe: Your mental health concerns are notable and may be impacting daily functioning. Speaking with a mental health professional is recommended.
general.moderate: At this level, psychological concerns may be affecting your daily life. It is recommended to take active steps and consider available support options.

severe: 继续保持带给你幸福感的习惯和活动
将你的积极经验与他人分享
保持感恩和正念的练习
关注持续成长和生活意义的深化
moderate: 继续保持现有的积极生活方式
分享你的经验和积极感受
帮助他人也是提升幸福感的有效方式
持续发展个人兴趣和社交网络
normal: 尝试每天做一件让自己感到满足的事情

练习感恩日记，关注生活中的积极面

保持适当的运动和户外活动

normal: 继续保持健康的生活方式和心理状态
关注自我成长和积极体验
保持规律的运动和社交活动
如遇到困难，记得寻求支持

与信任的人保持沟通

识别您具体的困扰来源
尝试适合自己的放松和应对方式

确保身边有信赖的人给予支持
遵循专业建议的治疗方案
保持基本的日常自我照顾

moderate: Share your experiences and positive feelings with others

normal: Try doing one fulfilling activity each day

Develop a hobby that gives you a sense of accomplishment

normal: Continue maintaining a healthy lifestyle and mental well-being
Focus on personal growth and positive experiences
Maintain regular exercise and social activities

mild: Focus on self-care with good routines and regular exercise
Learn simple relaxation and stress-relief techniques
Stay in communication with people you trust
If symptoms persist or worsen, consider consulting a professional

moderate: Consider consulting a mental health professional
Identify your specific sources of concern
Try relaxation and coping methods that suit you
Engage in meaningful activities and social interactions
severe: Schedule a mental health professional assessment as soon as possible
Make sure you have trusted people around you for support
Follow the treatment plan recommended by your professional
If you feel overwhelmed, call a mental health helpline for immediate support
